data.content: Shipment review approved. Tests verified on main: lease-audit-filters.test.ts (10 tests covering rolling last-24h filter semantics with boundary conditions and preset precedence), lease-audit-view-helpers.test.ts (26 tests covering buildCombinedSeries aggregation across queue types by agent and buildLeaderboard margin calculations with tie-breaking), lease-audit.test.ts (18 tests covering core audit persistence and aggregation). All 2237 tests pass (165 suites). Commits 2d4b8fc379ee and 9c9340b340d6 tagged and present on main.
